name: kbridge-ratchet-22-animate
description: Coverage-campaign showcase: ratchet_22 needed all four campaign fixes - F1 synthesized the missing sub-assembly children, F2 welded the constant-pose UnknownJointType (base/runway), F3 recovered the SliderJointType whose axis chain failed (the slider never moves in the recording -> honest weld), and B-bug-014 oriented every weld frame. One joint remains honestly dropped (its occurrence exists in NEITHER the table nor the keyframes). Sweep drives the emitted driver joint_0 0->170 deg, 35/35 steps, no overrides. Pass/fail = Converged + SlopSuccess. doc=MM, CPig-only. Slop: KinematicBridge/out/_slop-side-by-side/ratchet-22-bind-sweep-animate.canary.slop.json.

setup.vlmDescription: A ratchet-and-slider mechanism as shaded solid CAD parts: a toothed ratchet disk, two pawls, a crank with connecting rod posed mid-rotation by the solver, a slider on a runway, spring ends and a bolt, on base brackets, overlaid with a CPig frame-triad skeleton, at a sane scale.

checkpoints.name: persp
checkpoints.description: ratchet_22 posed mid-sweep by CPig's solve; F3's welded slider and the F1/F2 recoveries hold the train together.
